title: ACTFL Speaking Placement Check-in (v1)
description: Language-agnostic placement diagnostic aligned to ACTFL proficiency descriptors.

ui.prompt_en: Which statement best matches your current speaking ability in your target language?
ui.prompt_ko: 현재 목표 언어 말하기 능력을 가장 잘 설명하는 문장을 고르세요.
ui.context: Choose the closest match, not a perfect one.

options.text: I can only use isolated words or memorized expressions.
I can handle basic needs with short, practiced phrases.
I can form simple sentences about familiar topics.
I can sustain simple conversations in everyday situations.
I can explain and describe in connected sentences with some detail.
I can discuss less familiar topics and support opinions at length.
I can discuss complex or abstract topics with precision and flexibility.

ui.prompt_en: In an unplanned conversation, what can you usually do?
ui.prompt_ko: 즉흥 대화 상황에서 보통 어느 정도까지 할 수 있나요?
ui.context: Example: meeting someone new, handling a simple issue, or making plans.

options.text: Ask/answer only very simple questions with pauses.
Handle short exchanges on familiar daily topics.
Keep a conversation going with basic follow-up questions.
Manage most routine social/professional interactions.
Discuss and defend opinions with extended responses.
Navigate nuanced discussions and adjust style by context.

ui.prompt_en: In your target language, write 3-5 sentences about what you can currently do in conversations and what you still find difficult.
ui.prompt_ko: 목표 언어로 현재 대화에서 가능한 것과 아직 어려운 점을 3-5문장으로 써 보세요.
ui.context: Include at least one concrete example if possible.

ui.prompt_en: How well do you usually understand spoken language at natural speed?
ui.prompt_ko: 자연스러운 속도의 말하기를 보통 어느 정도 이해하나요?
ui.context: Think of class discussions, podcasts, videos, or peer conversations.

options.text: I catch only a few words and need repeated support.
I understand main ideas in very familiar contexts.
I follow most routine conversations with occasional gaps.
I understand detailed points on familiar and some new topics.
I understand extended discourse, including implicit meaning.

ui.prompt_en: If you give a 2-3 minute explanation in your target language, what is most accurate?
ui.prompt_ko: 목표 언어로 2-3분 설명을 한다면 가장 가까운 설명은 무엇인가요?
ui.context: Example topics: your routine, a project, a local issue, or personal opinion.

options.text: I can produce a few short phrases, but not sustained speech.
I can give basic information using simple connected sentences.
I can organize ideas with examples and basic transitions.
I can present clear, structured explanations with supporting detail.
I can present nuanced arguments and adapt language to audience/formality.

ui.prompt_en: When communication breaks down, what do you typically do?
ui.prompt_ko: 대화가 잘 안 통할 때 보통 어떻게 대처하나요?
ui.context: Think of clarification, paraphrasing, confirming meaning, or reformulating.

options.text: I mostly stop or switch to my first language quickly.
I ask for repetition and use very simple rephrasing.
I can clarify meaning with short follow-up questions.
I can reformulate ideas and negotiate meaning with confidence.
I can manage misunderstandings strategically and maintain flow.

ui.prompt_en: Which statement best describes your grammar and vocabulary control when speaking spontaneously?
ui.prompt_ko: 즉흥적으로 말할 때 문법/어휘 통제 수준을 가장 잘 설명하는 문장을 고르세요.
ui.context: Focus on consistency under real-time pressure.

options.text: Frequent errors make my message hard to follow.
I can control basic patterns but often need to simplify.
I generally control common structures with occasional breakdowns.
I control a broad range of structures with mostly clear output.
I can adjust language precisely for complexity and register.

ui.prompt_en: How understandable is your pronunciation to native or highly proficient speakers?
ui.prompt_ko: 원어민 또는 고숙련 화자에게 당신의 발음은 어느 정도 이해되나요?
ui.context: Consider clarity, rhythm, stress/intonation, and consistency.

options.text: Often hard to understand without repetition.
Usually understandable in familiar topics with some effort from listeners.
Generally understandable with occasional pronunciation interference.
Clear and natural in most situations.
Very clear and flexible across formal/informal contexts.

ui.prompt_en: How well can you adjust tone/register based on audience (friend, teacher, professional setting)?
ui.prompt_ko: 상대(친구/교사/전문가)에 따라 말투와 레지스터를 얼마나 조절할 수 있나요?
ui.context: Think about politeness, phrasing choices, and appropriateness.

options.text: I rarely adjust register and may sound inappropriate.
I can make basic formal/informal distinctions.
I usually adapt tone appropriately in common situations.
I can shift register effectively for varied audiences.
I can fine-tune style strategically for nuance and impact.

ui.prompt_en: After reading/listening to new information, what can you usually do when summarizing and responding?
ui.prompt_ko: 새로운 정보를 읽거나 들은 뒤, 요약하고 반응할 때 보통 어느 수준까지 가능한가요?

options.text: I can repeat isolated facts but struggle to connect ideas.
I can summarize the main point with simple language.
I can summarize key details and give a short response.
I can synthesize details and explain implications with support.
I can integrate multiple viewpoints and build a well-supported argument.

actfl_levels.label: Novice Low
actfl_levels.description_en: Can communicate with isolated words and memorized expressions in highly predictable contexts.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 매우 예측 가능한 상황에서 단어와 암기 표현 중심으로 의사소통할 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Novice Mid
actfl_levels.description_en: Can handle simple, practiced exchanges using words and short phrases.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 짧은 구와 문장을 활용해 익숙한 주제에서 기본 상호작용이 가능합니다.

actfl_levels.label: Novice High
actfl_levels.description_en: Can create short sentences on familiar topics with limited consistency.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 익숙한 주제에서 짧은 문장을 만들 수 있으나 일관성은 제한적입니다.

actfl_levels.label: Intermediate Low
actfl_levels.description_en: Can manage simple conversations and basic question-answer exchanges.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 기본 질문-응답 중심의 간단한 대화를 수행할 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Intermediate Mid
actfl_levels.description_en: Can sustain straightforward conversations in connected sentences on familiar topics.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 익숙한 주제에서 연결된 문장으로 대화를 비교적 안정적으로 이어갈 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Intermediate High
actfl_levels.description_en: Can handle uncomplicated tasks and begin discussing less familiar topics with support.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 단순 과제를 자립적으로 수행하고 덜 익숙한 주제도 보조가 있으면 다룰 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Advanced Low
actfl_levels.description_en: Can narrate and describe in major time frames with paragraph-length language.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 주요 시제를 활용해 단락 길이의 서술과 묘사가 가능합니다.

actfl_levels.label: Advanced Mid
actfl_levels.description_en: Can participate effectively in most informal and some formal conversations.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 대부분의 비격식 상황과 일부 격식 상황에서 효과적으로 의사소통할 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Advanced High
actfl_levels.description_en: Can discuss broad topics and support opinions through extended discourse.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 다양한 주제를 길게 설명하고 의견을 근거와 함께 제시할 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Superior
actfl_levels.description_en: Can discuss abstract issues and support hypotheses with structured language.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 추상적 이슈를 구조화된 언어로 다루고 가설을 근거와 함께 제시할 수 있습니다.

actfl_levels.label: Distinguished
actfl_levels.description_en: Can use language strategically and persuasively in complex professional and academic contexts.
actfl_levels.description_ko: 복합적인 학술·전문 맥락에서 전략적이고 설득력 있게 언어를 구사할 수 있습니다.
